data.raceComments: {"comment":"The top racing just keeps on coming on this day, and the million-dollar Australian Oaks has drawn a strong field, with the NZ Oaks winner 1. OHOPE WINS heading up the field. She was a fast finishing fourth in her Australian debut in the G1 Vinery Stakes over 2000m, and now that she is racing over a more suitable trip, she is the one to beat. 3. PROFOUNDLY showed a great turn of foot to score very easily in the G3 Adrian Knox Stakes over 2000m here last week. If this race has not come too soon for her, then she will be the main threat to the top pick. 2. AFTER SUMMER sat close to the pace in the Vinery Stakes last time out, and drove hard to just miss out on winning by a nose at Rosehill 2 weeks ago. She ended her spring prep with a third in the VRC Oaks over 2500m, so she won't have any issue seeing out the extra 400m here. Each way all day. 5. LONG LEGS was close up in the Vinery Stakes, and she should cope with 2400m. Some cut in the ground would help her, so don't drop her.","runners":[1,3,2,5],"exclusive":true}
